    Module related to cleaning and hygiene tasks.
    completeItem(Long, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistController
    Marks a specific checklist item as completed by the authenticated user.

    Marks a checklist item as completed by the given user.
    corsConfigurationSource() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.SecurityConfig
    Defines the CORS configuration used by the application.
    countByEquipmentOrganizationIdAndIsDeviationTrueAndTimestampBetween(Long, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TemperatureLogRepository
    Counts temperature deviation entries for a given organization within a timestamp range.
    countByEquipmentOrganizationIdAndTimestampBetween(Long, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface ntnu.no.fs_v26.repository.TemperatureLogRepository
    Counts all temperature logs for a given organization within a timestamp range.
    create(Long, double, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TemperatureController
    Records a new temperature reading for a specific piece of equipment.
    create(ChecklistRequest, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistController
    Creates a new checklist for the authenticated user's organization.
    create(DeviationRequest, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.DeviationController
    Reports a new deviation for the authenticated user's organization.
    createChecklist(ChecklistRequest, User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.ChecklistService
    Creates a new checklist and its items for the user's organization.
    createDocument(TrainingDocument) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Creates a new training document using metadata only (no file upload).
    createDocument(TrainingDocument) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Creates a new training document using metadata only (no file upload).
    createLog(AlcoholLogRequest, Authentication) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogController
    Creates a new alcohol log entry for the current shift.
    createLog(AlcoholLogRequest, String) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.AlcoholLogService
    Creates and saves a new alcohol log entry for the current shift.
    createOrganization(AdminCreateOrganizationRequest) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AdminController
    Creates a new organization along with an initial admin user.
    createOrganization(AdminCreateOrganizationRequest) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.AdminService
    Creates a new organization and an initial admin user for it.

    Data Transfer Object (DTO) used when creating a new quiz question.

    Creates a new user in the authenticated admin's organization.

    Creates a new user in the same organization as the authenticated admin.
